description: median 偶数长度取错中位，py_compile 通过、pytest 失败
message: pytest 失败：tests/test_stats.py::test_median_even — assert median([1,2,3,4]) == 2.5，实际 3。偶数长度列表的中位数计算有误。

setup_files.stats.py:
def median(nums):
    ordered = sorted(nums)
    mid = len(ordered) // 2
    return ordered[mid]

expect_files.stats.py:
def median(nums):
    ordered = sorted(nums)
    n = len(ordered)
    if n % 2 == 1:
        return ordered[n // 2]
    lo, hi = n // 2 - 1, n // 2
    return (ordered[lo] + ordered[hi]) / 2
